MINUTES FOR JUL-19-2021 9:30 AM

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, JUL-19-2021 HEARING HELD RE: DEFENDANT VESTAS-AMERICAN WIND TECHNOLOGY, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION OF PLAINTIFFS CLAIM AND TO STAY PROCEEDINGS PENDING ARBITRATION. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MOTION GRANTED. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING.) COUNSEL FOR THE DEFENDANT IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: ROSE MILLER, CSR NO. 5041, EMAIL: RMILLERCSR@GMAIL.COM. (302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-28-2022 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2021 Continued To Mar-23-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendant Vestas American Wind Technology Incs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration Of Plaintiffs Claim And To Stay Proceedings Pending Arbitration Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jul-19-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Atty. DAVID BUONCRISTIANI, Esq. of Hanson Bridgett LLP (Tel: 415-777-3200) for plaintiff El Campo Wind, LLC;
Attys. JESSE L. MILLER, Esq. of MARIAH K. FAIRLEY, Esq. of Reed Smith LLP (Tel: 415-543-8700) for defendant Vestas-American Wind Technology, Inc.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT VESTAS-AMERICAN WIND TECHNOLOGY, INC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration Of Plaintiffs Claim And To Stay Proceedings Pending Arbitration.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Vestas-American Wind Technology, Inc.'s motion to compel arbitration and stay is granted. (See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Counsel for the Defendant is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR No. 5041, Email: RMillerCSR@gmail.com. (302/EPS)
